description: Ambiguous QA benchmark — lab + real-world labeled gate decisions

concepts.alpha: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
concepts.beta: the reactor core is overheating in sector beta

cases.question: the reactor core is overheating in sector unknown
cases.goal: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
cases.llm_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector beta. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.

concepts.alpha: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
concepts.beta: the reactor core is overheating in sector beta

cases.question: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
cases.goal: the reactor core is overheating in sector alpha
cases.llm_draft: The reactor core is overheating in sector alpha. Recommend immediate cooling protocol.

concepts.fire: smoke and flames spreading through the building
concepts.water: cold water flooding the basement floor
concepts.smoke: thick smoke reducing visibility in the hallway

cases.question: heat and smoke detected near the east wing unclear source
cases.goal: smoke and flames spreading through the building
cases.llm_draft: Cold water flooding the basement floor. Recommend drainage protocol.

concepts.fire: smoke and flames spreading through the building
concepts.water: cold water flooding the basement floor

cases.question: fire alarm triggered smoke in the hallway
cases.goal: smoke and flames spreading through the building
cases.llm_draft: Smoke and flames spreading through the building. Evacuate immediately.

concepts.cardiac: patient has elevated heart rate and shortness of breath
concepts.respiratory: patient shows rapid breathing and low oxygen saturation

cases.question: patient presents with rapid heartbeat and breathing difficulty unclear primary cause
cases.goal: patient has elevated heart rate and shortness of breath
cases.llm_draft: Patient shows rapid breathing and low oxygen saturation. Start supplemental oxygen.

cases.source_note: Helpdesk: user locked out vs account takeover — common mis-triage

concepts.password_reset: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow
concepts.account_compromise: employee account shows signs of unauthorized access and credential theft

cases.question: user cannot log in after travel and reports unusual login alert email unclear if hacked
cases.goal: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow
cases.llm_draft: Signs point to account compromise. Lock account immediately and initiate incident response.

cases.source_note: Clear forgot-password with no security indicators

concepts.password_reset: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow
concepts.account_compromise: employee account shows signs of unauthorized access and credential theft

cases.question: employee forgot password after vacation no suspicious activity reported
cases.goal: employee forgot password and needs standard password reset workflow
cases.llm_draft: Standard password reset workflow. Send secure reset link to verified email.

cases.source_note: Refund request vs store-credit offer — policy ambiguity

concepts.full_refund: customer requests full cash refund for defective product within return window
concepts.store_credit: customer accepts store credit or exchange for defective product

cases.question: customer unhappy with broken item wants compensation unclear refund or exchange
cases.goal: customer requests full cash refund for defective product within return window
cases.llm_draft: Offer store credit or exchange for the defective product per standard policy.

cases.source_note: Phishing alert vs legitimate marketing — SOC triage ambiguity

concepts.phishing: suspicious email with urgent link requesting credentials is phishing attack
concepts.newsletter: legitimate company newsletter with promotional links and unsubscribe footer

cases.question: employee forwarded email with login link and urgent deadline unsure if phishing or marketing
cases.goal: suspicious email with urgent link requesting credentials is phishing attack
cases.llm_draft: This appears to be a legitimate newsletter. No action required beyond normal review.

cases.source_note: Fraudulent charge vs merchant duplicate billing

concepts.fraud: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block
concepts.duplicate: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud

cases.question: customer sees two identical charges from online store unsure fraud or duplicate billing
cases.goal: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block
cases.llm_draft: Duplicate billing error from merchant. Request refund from merchant, no card block needed.

cases.source_note: Known merchant duplicate — clear billing error path

concepts.fraud: unrecognized transaction on card is likely fraudulent and requires card block
concepts.duplicate: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud

cases.question: customer sees two identical charges from same coffee shop same day recognizes merchant
cases.goal: duplicate charge from same merchant is billing error needing refund not fraud
cases.llm_draft: Duplicate billing error from known merchant. Contact merchant for refund, card safe.

cases.source_note: Triage: stroke symptoms vs severe migraine — time-critical ambiguity

concepts.stroke: patient has sudden one sided weakness and slurred speech suggesting stroke
concepts.migraine: patient has severe headache with nausea and light sensitivity typical migraine

cases.question: patient reports sudden headache and difficulty speaking unclear stroke or migraine
cases.goal: patient has sudden one sided weakness and slurred speech suggesting stroke
cases.llm_draft: Symptoms consistent with severe migraine. Recommend rest and standard pain management.

cases.source_note: Voluntary resignation vs involuntary layoff — different legal workflows

concepts.resignation: employee submitted voluntary resignation with standard notice period
concepts.layoff: employee is being involuntarily laid off due to workforce reduction

cases.question: employee leaving company next month unclear if voluntary quit or position eliminated
cases.goal: employee submitted voluntary resignation with standard notice period
cases.llm_draft: Process as involuntary layoff. Prepare severance package and offboarding checklist.

cases.source_note: Contract breach vs negotiated delay — dispute triage

concepts.breach: vendor missed delivery deadline constituting material breach of contract
concepts.delay: vendor requested extension covered by force majeure clause not breach

cases.question: vendor missed shipment date citing supply issues unclear breach or allowed delay
cases.goal: vendor missed delivery deadline constituting material breach of contract
cases.llm_draft: Supply issues qualify as force majeure. No breach, grant extension per contract clause.

cases.source_note: Engine fire warning vs faulty sensor — ops decision ambiguity

concepts.engine_fire: aircraft engine fire warning with confirmed smoke requires emergency landing
concepts.sensor_fault: engine fire warning triggered by faulty sensor with no confirmed fire

cases.question: cockpit engine fire warning with faint smell unsure real fire or sensor fault
cases.goal: aircraft engine fire warning with confirmed smoke requires emergency landing
cases.llm_draft: Likely faulty sensor with history of false alarms. Continue flight and monitor.

cases.source_note: Plagiarism vs improper citation — academic integrity triage

concepts.plagiarism: student submitted work with copied passages without attribution is plagiarism
concepts.citation_error: student work has improper citation formatting but not intentional plagiarism

cases.question: essay has uncited paragraphs similar to source unclear plagiarism or citation mistake
cases.goal: student submitted work with copied passages without attribution is plagiarism
cases.llm_draft: Improper citation formatting only. Provide citation style guidance, no integrity hearing.

cases.source_note: Stockout vs delayed shipment — fulfillment triage

concepts.stockout: warehouse has zero inventory and order cannot be fulfilled stockout
concepts.delayed_shipment: inventory exists but shipment delayed due to carrier backlog

cases.question: customer order not arrived warehouse status unclear out of stock or carrier delay
cases.goal: warehouse has zero inventory and order cannot be fulfilled stockout
cases.llm_draft: Inventory available, carrier backlog causing delay. Provide tracking update and ETA.
